report.summary: Cycle v3 (13:08 CET): Vercel build BROKEN on latest commit (1b4a15e) — 3 new tool pages with 'use client' + metadata conflict blocking 78 ecosystem pages + 2 queued guides from reaching production; rate limiting definitively 0/6 routes; 6 build cycles completed today; fix-build is Priority 1 before anything else ships.

sections.title: Analytics — Delta Since Last Cycle (12:13 → 13:08)
items: GSC organic signals: NONE yet — site is Day 15, inside the 14–21 day emergence window. Next cycle could be the first impression. All SEO infrastructure must be clean NOW.
Production pages: 280 (UNCHANGED since last standup — Vercel build failure on commit 1b4a15e is blocking new deploys; previous stable deploy 6CsqiSbCs is live)
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items now queued (genius-act-stablecoin-guide + best-meme-coin-launchpads-2026) — built this cycle at 12:30; cannot be promoted until build is fixed
Build Run 6 completed (12:30): GENIUS Act Stablecoin Regulation guide + Best Meme Coin Launchpads 2026 guide — both scaffolded, SEO-optimized, structured data added, added to PUBLISH_QUEUE
Design-v3 ran (12:36): additional OG images and SVG social cards completed for the latest guide batch
Community-v5 ran (12:49): 5th community cycle today — social drafts for GENIUS Act + meme launchpad content staged and ready to push once pages go live
EOD QA ran (12:58): confirmed Vercel build FAILED — this is the most critical new data point this cycle; resolves the rate limiting conflict from v2 (0/6 is accurate)
Data pipelines: CoinGecko healthy (60s TTL), DefiLlama healthy — no upstream incidents; Bloomberg Screener V3 still on mock data (Sprint 58 target)

Top organic targets once GSC activates: /tools/dca-calculator, /learn/crypto-tax-guide-2026 (April 15 deadline 31 days away), /learn/ethereum-pectra-upgrade-guide (mainnet April 2026), /learn/bitcoin-etf-guide

sections.title: Project Manager — Last Cycle vs Plan
items: SHIPPED ✅ Build Run 6 (12:30): GENIUS Act stablecoin guide + best meme coin launchpads 2026 — full pipeline: research → content → SEO → scaffold → PUBLISH_QUEUE
SHIPPED ✅ Design-v3 (12:36): OG images and SVG social cards for new guide batch
SHIPPED ✅ Community-v5 (12:49): social drafts for GENIUS Act + launchpads content — ready to deploy to Twitter/X, Discord once pages go live
SHIPPED ✅ EOD QA (12:58): full cycle-close sweep — identifies build failure, audits TS errors (57 total, down 1), confirms pipeline health

NOT DONE 🔴 VERCEL BUILD BROKEN (new — confirmed 12:58): commit 1b4a15e fails — 3 new tool pages (token-radar, risk-score, whale-watch) have both 'use client' directive AND 'export const metadata' — illegal pattern in Next.js App Router. 78 ecosystem/dApp pages + 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked from production until fix lands.

NOT DONE 🔴 Rate limiting: EOD confirms 0/6 public API routes have checkRateLimit() wired — the 'Active (token bucket)' status in the 11:17 publish report was a false positive or referred to /api/health only. rate-limiter.ts is built; wiring is the only remaining step.
NOT DONE 🔴 Fallback data: 2/6 routes (prices + market-dominance only); /api/trending, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics return 502 on upstream failure
CARRY-OVER 🟡 TS errors: 57 total (AICourseRecommendations.tsx ~17, structured-data.examples.ts ~8 — pre-existing, ignoreBuildErrors:true means non-blocking in prod)
CARRY-OVER 🟡 Vercel Pro trial expires in 10 days — billing action required at vercel.com/account/billing
BLOCKED (Jefe) 🔴 WalletConnect production Project ID — cloud.walletconnect.com → NEXT_PUBLIC_WALLETCONNECT_PROJECT_ID; blocks wallet auth, referral attribution
BLOCKED (Jefe) 🔴 GitHub Actions secrets — repo Settings → Actions; blocks Playwright CI before Sprint 58 merges
Sprint 58 pipeline: DeFiLlama Live API (lead), Email Drip (Resend), Referral Backend + On-chain, dApp Guides 70–79 — NOT STARTED; blocked on build fix first

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — FIX THE BROKEN BUILD (blocking everything). Commit 1b4a15e fails on Vercel: token-radar/page.tsx, risk-score/page.tsx, whale-watch/page.tsx all use 'use client' + 'export const metadata' — the same pattern fixed repeatedly in prior sprints. Solution: either (a) remove 'use client' and convert interactivity to child client components, or (b) move metadata to a parent server layout.tsx. Until this is resolved, 78 ecosystem/dApp pages are NOT in production and the 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE guides (GENIUS Act + meme launchpads) cannot ship. This is a <30-minute fix that unlocks everything else this cycle. Delegate: Programmer immediately.

PRIORITY 2 — Wire rate limiting to all 5 remaining unprotected API routes. EOD QA resolved the earlier conflicting reports: rate limiting is definitively at 0/6 public routes. rate-limiter.ts and checkRateLimit() are already built and wired on /api/health — it's a copy-paste wiring task across /api/prices, /api/trending, /api/defi-yields, /api/fear-greed, /api/market-metrics, /api/market-dominance. Simultaneously add FALLBACK_DATA to the 4 routes returning 502 on upstream failure. We are inside the GSC emergence window — any viral page or crawler burst hitting unprotected routes risks upstream API rate limits and cost spikes at exactly the worst time. This is a 30-minute task. Delegate: Data Engineer + Programmer in parallel with the build fix.

PRIORITY 3 — After build fix: promote PUBLISH_QUEUE + kick off Sprint 58 DeFiLlama API. Once the build is green, publish the 2 queued guides (GENIUS Act stablecoin + best meme launchpads 2026) — both are timely (GENIUS Act is live law, meme season is active). Then immediately kick off Sprint 58: DeFiLlama Live API replaces mock data in Bloomberg Screener V3, the highest-traffic tool on the site. Real TVL/APY feeds → engagement signals → ranking acceleration at exactly the moment GSC is activating. Delegate: Publish Queue (guides) + Data Engineer/Programmer (Screener V3 real data).
